home.hero-text: I build scalable web applications and educational platforms — from Junior to Lead Frontend, owning architecture, component systems, performance, and production delivery.

about.p1Before: Frontend developer with solid production experience — from freelance to
about.p1After: in EdTech and product teams. I own architecture, design systems, performance, and shipping to production.
about.p2After: — REST APIs, WebSockets, CI, and code review. React & Next.js when the stack requires it.
about.p3After: backend developer: pet projects, API integration, and ready to learn fast on a strong team.
about.p4: Russian — native, English — B2. Strong frontend with immediate impact — ready to grow into mobile and backend with the team.

home.experience-sub: From freelance to Lead Frontend in product teams

home.process-sub: From ambiguity to production — with ownership at every stage

align.title: Align
align.text: Understand the problem before touching code.
align.bullet1: Clarify goals, constraints, and success metrics with product & design
align.bullet2: Surface trade-offs early — scope, timeline, technical debt
align.bullet3: Agree on deliverables and definition of done upfront

architect.title: Architect
architect.text: Design systems that scale beyond the first release.
architect.bullet1: Component boundaries, state management, and API contracts
architect.bullet2: Break work into shippable increments with clear milestones
architect.bullet3: Document key decisions for the team

deliver.title: Deliver
deliver.bullet1: Readable code, reviews, and automated checks in CI
deliver.bullet2: Performance budgets, accessibility, and responsive UX
deliver.bullet3: Unblock teammates and raise the bar through mentoring

own.title: Own
own.bullet1: Deploy safely, monitor metrics, and catch regressions fast
own.bullet2: Iterate based on user feedback and real data
own.bullet3: Leave the codebase better than I found it

home.cta-text: Email yanhanow{'@'}gmail.ru or message on Telegram — I'll reply quickly.
